title: Interpret Shutdown Queue Behavior and AGV Movement During Shutdown and Startup
summary: Use this source-based reference to interpret expected AGV position and movement during shutdown and startup. The training states that shutdown queues are where AGVs sit when the system is shut down, shutdown includes AGVs cycling through chargers, and on startup AGVs move into their assigned zones.
when_to_use: Use when a support user needs to understand or explain whether observed AGV locations and movement are consistent with the training description of shutdown and startup behavior.
not_for: Do not use as a control procedure for placing the system into shutdown or startup.
Do not use as a corrective procedure for AGVs that fail to move as expected.
Do not use to diagnose root cause beyond comparing observed behavior to the training description.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Observe or discuss AGV position and movement and compare it to the source-backed shutdown and startup description.

safety_notes: This source provides interpretive guidance only and does not provide physical intervention steps.
Do not infer unsupported corrective actions from this training segment.
access_or_tools_needed: Visibility into AGV locations or system walkthrough access
Source-backed training description of shutdown queues and startup movement

access_required: Ability to observe AGV locations or review the relevant walkthrough/training view
system_preconditions: A shutdown or startup condition is being discussed or observed
Assigned zones are known to the reviewer

visual_references.description: Training video frame aligned to the transcript describing shutdown queues, charger cycling, and AGV movement into assigned zones on startup.
Sorter layout frame referenced for shutdown queue locations and zone behavior.
Lifecycle frame showing AGVs starting in shutdown at charging locations and returning to shutdown after sort completion.

steps.title: Confirm the discussion or observation is about shutdown state
steps.purpose: Ensure the AGV behavior is being interpreted in the correct operating context rather than normal running behavior.
steps.instruction: Identify whether the system is being discussed or observed in shutdown rather than running.
steps.expected_result: The reviewer has established that the behavior under review is shutdown or startup related.
steps.healthy_condition: The system context is clearly understood as shutdown or startup, not normal running.
steps.failure_condition: The operating state is unclear, making shutdown queue interpretation unreliable.

actions.label: Determine operating context
actions.exact_action: Identify whether the system is being discussed or observed in shutdown rather than running.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Transcript-aligned frame describing the distinction between shutdown and running states.
Lifecycle depiction showing startup, sorting, bag-out, and shutdown progression.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the system state cannot be determined from the available observation or discussion context.

source_evidence.text: Identify whether the system is being discussed or observed in shutdown rather than running.
The transcript discusses shutdown queues as the place AGVs sit when shut down and distinguishes running, bag out or close out, and shutdown states.
Source-grounded content indicates AGVs start in a shutdown state at specific charging locations and later return to shutdown.

steps.title: Interpret shutdown queues as AGV holding locations
steps.purpose: Apply the source definition of shutdown queues to observed AGV positions.
steps.instruction: Check the shutdown queues and interpret them as the place where AGVs sit when the system is shut down.
steps.expected_result: AGVs located in shutdown queues during shutdown are understood as matching the documented training description.
steps.healthy_condition: Observed AGVs are sitting in shutdown queues while the system is shut down.
steps.failure_condition: Observed AGV positions do not align with the source description of shutdown queues as shutdown holding locations.

actions.label: Review shutdown queue location
actions.exact_action: Check the shutdown queues and interpret them as the place where AGVs sit when the system is shut down.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Frame aligned to the statement that shutdown queues are where AGVs sit when shut down.
Sorter layout frame showing shutdown queue locations.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV positions do not match the documented training description.

source_evidence.text: Check the shutdown queues and interpret them as the place where AGVs sit when the system is shut down.

source_ref.quote_or_summary: “Shut down queues is just where it sits when it's shut down... when they start up, they move into their own zones”

source_evidence.text: Shutdown queues are the holding location for AGVs in shutdown state.

steps.title: Verify charger cycling expectation during shutdown
steps.purpose: Use the training description to interpret charger-related AGV movement during shutdown.
steps.instruction: Observe whether AGVs are cycling through charging while in shutdown logic, using only the source-backed expectation that shutdown includes charger cycling.
steps.expected_result: The reviewer recognizes charger cycling during shutdown as expected behavior when it matches the training description.
steps.healthy_condition: AGVs in shutdown are cycling through chargers in a manner consistent with the source description.
steps.failure_condition: Observed shutdown behavior does not appear consistent with the source-backed expectation of charger cycling, or the observation cannot be confirmed.

actions.label: Observe charger cycling
actions.exact_action: Observe whether AGVs are cycling through charging while in shutdown logic, using only the source-backed expectation that shutdown includes charger cycling.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Transcript-aligned frame noting AGVs cycling through chargers during shutdown logic.
Lifecycle frame describing AGVs returning to shutdown and cycling back to chargers.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV positions or movement do not match the documented training description.
Escalate if charger-related shutdown behavior cannot be reconciled with the source-backed expectation.

source_evidence.text: Observe whether AGVs are cycling through charging while in shutdown logic, using only the source-backed expectation that shutdown includes charger cycling.
The aligned transcript discusses shutdown queues as the place AGVs sit when shut down and AGVs cycling through chargers.
AGVs start in a shutdown state at specific charging locations and return to shutdown with AGVs cycling back to chargers.
Shutdown puts the system into a state for AGVs to rotate on chargers.

steps.title: Verify movement from shutdown queues into assigned zones on startup
steps.purpose: Confirm the expected startup transition described by the source.
steps.instruction: When startup begins, verify that AGVs move from shutdown queues into their own assigned zones.
steps.expected_result: Observed startup movement matches the training description of AGVs leaving shutdown queues and moving into assigned zones.
steps.healthy_condition: On startup, AGVs move into their own assigned zones.
steps.failure_condition: On startup, AGVs do not move into assigned zones as described, or movement cannot be confirmed.

actions.label: Observe startup movement
actions.exact_action: When startup begins, verify that AGVs move from shutdown queues into their own assigned zones.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Frame aligned to the statement that when AGVs start up, they move into their own zones.
Sorter layout frame describing shutdown queues and assigned zone behavior.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV positions or movement do not match the documented training description.
The source does not provide corrective actions for AGVs that fail to move as expected.

source_evidence.text: When startup begins, verify that AGVs move from shutdown queues into their own assigned zones.

source_ref.quote_or_summary: “Shut down queues is just where it sits when it's shut down... when they start up, they move into their own zones”

source_evidence.text: The speaker describes shutdown queues and sorter zones where AGVs only pick up and drop off within their assigned zone.

steps.title: Compare observed behavior to the source description
steps.purpose: Reach a source-grounded interpretation of whether observed AGV behavior matches shutdown and startup expectations.
steps.instruction: Compare the observed AGV location and movement to the source description: shutdown queues during shutdown, assigned zones after startup.
steps.expected_result: The reviewer can distinguish expected shutdown queue behavior from expected post-startup zone assignment.
steps.healthy_condition: Observed behavior matches the source description: shutdown queues during shutdown and assigned zones after startup.
steps.failure_condition: Observed behavior does not match the source description or cannot be confidently interpreted from the available evidence.

actions.label: Compare observation to training description
actions.exact_action: Compare the observed AGV location and movement to the source description: shutdown queues during shutdown, assigned zones after startup.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Primary source frame summarizing shutdown queue behavior and startup movement into zones.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if AGV positions or movement do not match the documented training description.
Escalate if additional corrective guidance is needed, because the source does not provide corrective actions.

source_evidence.text: Compare the observed AGV location and movement to the source description: shutdown queues during shutdown, assigned zones after startup.
The user can correctly interpret AGV location and movement during shutdown and startup and distinguish shutdown queue behavior from normal zone assignment.

source_ref.quote_or_summary: “Shut down queues is just where it sits when it's shut down... when they start up, they move into their own zones”

success_criteria: Shutdown queues are correctly interpreted as the place AGVs sit when the system is shut down.
Charger cycling during shutdown is recognized as part of the source-backed shutdown expectation.
Startup behavior is correctly interpreted as AGVs moving into their assigned zones.
The reviewer can distinguish shutdown queue behavior from normal zone assignment.
healthy_conditions: During shutdown, AGVs are sitting in shutdown queues.
During shutdown, AGVs may be cycling through chargers.
After startup begins, AGVs move into their own assigned zones.
failure_conditions: Observed AGV positions or movement do not match the documented training description.
The operating state cannot be determined well enough to interpret shutdown queue behavior.
AGVs do not appear to move into assigned zones on startup.
The source does not provide corrective actions for the observed mismatch.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if AGV positions or movement do not match the documented training description.
Escalate when corrective action is needed, because this source provides interpretation only and does not provide a recovery procedure.
Document the mismatch between observed behavior and the training description for further diagnosis.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Primary training frame covering shutdown queues, charger cycling, and movement into assigned zones.
Sorter layout with shutdown queue and zone concepts.
Lifecycle view showing shutdown and charging-state context.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: “Shut down queues is just where it sits when it's shut down... when they start up, they move into their own zones”

missing_details: The source does not provide a direct control procedure for initiating shutdown or startup.
The source does not provide corrective actions if AGVs fail to move as expected.
The source does not define timing thresholds for how quickly AGVs should move into assigned zones.
The source does not specify exact screens, commands, or system indicators to use for verification.
